meta_text: Grouped by experiment type, environment configuration, task configuration, and traffic network
hero_text: OpenURB benchmarks mixed traffic where human-driven vehicles optimize individual travel time while AVs collaborate to minimize group travel time under dynamic population shifts. Leaderboards below compare algorithms across environment configurations, different tasks, and traffic networks using benchmark KPIs.
controls_hint: Click a column to sort | Click again to toggle direction
footer_hint: Preview hover works best in Google Chrome.

metric_descriptions.t_pre: \(\hat{t}^{pre}\) Avg travel time before mutation (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_test: \(\hat{t}^{test}\) Avg travel time in testing phase (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_train: \(\hat{t}^{train}\) Avg travel time during training phase (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_train_end: \(\hat{t}^{train}_{end}\) Avg travel time in last 50 training episodes (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_train_HDV_end: \(\hat{t}^{train}_{HDV,end}\) Avg travel time of humans in last 50 training episodes (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_train_CAV_end: \(\hat{t}^{train}_{CAV,end}\) Avg travel time of CAVs in last 50 training episodes (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_dynamic: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}\) Avg travel time during dynamic switching phase (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_dynamic_start: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{start}\) Avg travel time in first 50 dynamic-switch episodes (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_dynamic_end: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{end}\) Avg travel time in last 50 dynamic-switch episodes (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_dynamic_HDV: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{HDV}\) Avg travel time of humans during dynamic switching (per-episode composition, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_dynamic_CAV: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{CAV}\) Avg travel time of CAVs during dynamic switching (per-episode composition, minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_dynamic_HDV_start: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{HDV,start}\) Avg travel time of humans in first 50 dynamic-switch episodes (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_dynamic_CAV_start: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{CAV,start}\) Avg travel time of CAVs in first 50 dynamic-switch episodes (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_CAV: \(\hat{t}^{test}_{CAV}\) Avg travel time of CAVs in testing phase (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_CAV_dynamic_end: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{CAV,end}\) Avg travel time of CAVs in last 50 dynamic-switch episodes (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_HDV_pre: \(\hat{t}^{pre}_{HDV}\) Avg travel time of humans before mutation (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_HDV_test: \(\hat{t}^{test}_{HDV}\) Avg travel time of humans in testing phase (minutes).
metric_descriptions.t_HDV_dynamic_end: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{HDV,end}\) Avg travel time of humans in last 50 dynamic-switch episodes (minutes).
metric_descriptions.CAV_advantage: \(\hat{t}^{test}_{HDV} / \hat{t}^{test}_{CAV}\) Ratio of human test time to CAV test time (>1 favors CAVs).
metric_descriptions.Effect_of_change: \(\hat{t}^{pre}_{HDV} / \hat{t}^{test}_{CAV}\) Ratio of human pre-mutation time to CAV test time.
metric_descriptions.Effect_of_remaining: \(\hat{t}^{pre}_{HDV} / \hat{t}^{test}_{HDV}\) Ratio of human pre-mutation time to human test time.
metric_descriptions.avg_speed_pre: \(\bar{v}^{pre}\) Avg speed before mutation from SUMO (km/h).
metric_descriptions.avg_speed_test: \(\bar{v}^{test}\) Avg speed in testing phase from SUMO (km/h).
metric_descriptions.avg_mileage_pre: \(\bar{\ell}^{pre}\) Avg route length before mutation from SUMO (km).
metric_descriptions.avg_mileage_test: \(\bar{\ell}^{test}\) Avg route length in testing phase from SUMO (km).
metric_descriptions.winrate: \(P(\hat{t}_{CAV} < \hat{t}_{HDV})\) Share of training episodes where CAVs are faster than humans.
metric_descriptions.cost_of_learning: \(c\) Avg per-agent travel-time spread during training (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_time_lost: \(\bar{\Delta t}\) Avg time lost after mutation across all agents (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_human_time_lost: \(\bar{\Delta t}_{HDV}\) Avg time lost after mutation for humans (minutes).
metric_descriptions.avg_CAV_time_lost: \(\bar{\Delta t}_{CAV}\) Avg time lost after mutation for CAVs (minutes).
metric_descriptions.diff_sumo_routerl: \(t_{SUMO} - \hat{t}^{test}\) SUMO avg duration minus RouteRL avg test travel time.
metric_descriptions.switch_cost: \(\hat{t}^{dyn} - \hat{t}^{train}_{end}\) Dynamic travel time minus end-of-training travel time (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.switch_cost_hdv: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{HDV} - \hat{t}^{train}_{HDV,end}\) Dynamic human travel time minus end-of-training human travel time (minutes).
metric_descriptions.switch_cost_cav: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{CAV} - \hat{t}^{train}_{CAV,end}\) Dynamic CAV travel time minus end-of-training CAV travel time (minutes).
metric_descriptions.dynamic_recovery: \(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{start} - \hat{t}^{dyn}_{end}\) Dynamic start travel time minus dynamic end travel time (minutes).
metric_descriptions.dynamic_volatility: \(\sigma(\hat{t}^{dyn})\) Std dev of per-episode travel time during dynamic switching (all agents, minutes).
metric_descriptions.dynamic_volatility_hdv: \(\sigma(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{HDV})\) Std dev of per-episode human travel time during dynamic switching (minutes).
metric_descriptions.dynamic_volatility_cav: \(\sigma(\hat{t}^{dyn}_{CAV})\) Std dev of per-episode CAV travel time during dynamic switching (minutes).
metric_descriptions.dynamic_instability_humans: \(\bar{\Delta a}_{HDV}\) Avg per-episode action-change rate for humans during dynamic switching.
metric_descriptions.dynamic_instability_CAVs: \(\bar{\Delta a}_{CAV}\) Avg per-episode action-change rate for CAVs during dynamic switching.
metric_descriptions.dynamic_time_excess: \(\bar{\Delta t}^{dyn}_{excess}\) Avg per-episode sum of time lost during dynamic switching (minutes).
metric_descriptions.switches_hdv_to_cav: \(N_{HDV \to CAV}\) Total HDV->CAV switch events during the dynamic phase.
metric_descriptions.switches_cav_to_hdv: \(N_{CAV \to HDV}\) Total CAV->HDV switch events during the dynamic phase.
metric_descriptions.switches_total: \(N_{switch}\) Total switch events during the dynamic phase.
metric_descriptions.switch_events_with_changes: \(N_{events}^{+}\) Number of switch events with at least one agent switching.
metric_descriptions.switches_per_event: \(\bar{N}_{switch/event}\) Avg switches per non-empty switch event.
metric_descriptions.switches_per_agent: \(\bar{N}_{switch/agent}\) Total switches divided by number of agents.
metric_descriptions.switches_per_agent_hdv_to_cav: \(\bar{N}_{HDV \to CAV/HDV}\) HDV->CAV switches per initial human agent.
metric_descriptions.switches_per_agent_cav_to_hdv: \(\bar{N}_{CAV \to HDV/CAV}\) CAV->HDV switches per initial CAV agent.
metric_descriptions.switch_churn_hdv_to_cav: \(U_{HDV \to CAV}\) Unique agents that ever switched from HDV to CAV.
metric_descriptions.switch_churn_cav_to_hdv: \(U_{CAV \to HDV}\) Unique agents that ever switched from CAV to HDV.
metric_descriptions.switch_churn_total: \(U_{switch}\) Unique agents that switched at least once (either direction).
metric_descriptions.machine_ratio_start: \(r_{start}\) Machine ratio at the first logged switch event.
metric_descriptions.machine_ratio_end: \(r_{end}\) Machine ratio at the last logged switch event.
metric_descriptions.machine_ratio_delta: \(\Delta r\) Change in machine ratio from first to last switch event.
metric_descriptions.machine_ratio_avg: \(\bar{r}\) Average machine ratio across switch events.
metric_descriptions.machine_ratio_min: \(r_{min}\) Minimum machine ratio across switch events.
metric_descriptions.machine_ratio_max: \(r_{max}\) Maximum machine ratio across switch events.
metric_descriptions.machine_ratio_std: \(\sigma(r)\) Std dev of machine ratio across switch events.
